name: correction_textual_note

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.14 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] ［＃「X」は底本では「Y」］ is the source-text divergence note: the displayed text X appears as Y in the底本 (source book). It annotates without transforming — the node carries the raw directive (hidden aozora-directive span) with the AnnotationKind::BaseTextVariant classification (pandoc/wire map `base-text-variant`). ~7k occurrences, the corpus' most common editorial note. Offsets from the §3 byte model; expected captured from the aozora #114/#118 reference implementation (the project's canonical processor).

source: 間違い［＃「間違い」は底本では「間違ひ」］です

expected.html: 間違い［＃「間違い」は底本では「間違ひ」］です
